name: EndeavourOS
tagline: A terminal-centric distro with a dynamic and friendly community
description: EndeavourOS sits between Arch Linux and Manjaro: it uses Arch as its base and gives you access to the AUR and pacman, but ships a friendly graphical installer and keeps the defaults minimal. Unlike Manjaro it does not delay packages — you get Arch packages as they land upstream. The community is unusually welcoming for an Arch-based distro, and the forum is an excellent resource for troubleshooting.
